# API Requirements Quality Checklist: Carfax Scraper MCP Tools

**Purpose**: Validate API/tool requirements for completeness, clarity, consistency, measurability, and scenario coverage before implementation/review gating.
**Created**: 2026-04-14
**Feature**: specs/003-carfax-scraper-mcp-tools/spec.md

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are required request/response contracts fully specified for `carfax_get_report` and `carfax_get_summary`, including field presence/optionality and data types? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements defined for behavior when no stale cache exists during upstream failure paths? [Gap, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK003 Are explicit requirements documented for session re-authentication outcomes after mid-request session expiry? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK004 Is the meaning and derivation logic of `overall_risk_rating` defined with unambiguous criteria? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK005 Are “retry metadata where applicable” rules explicit about required keys and when they must be present? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK006 Is cache TTL boundary behavior (exact expiry moment and clock source) specified precisely enough for deterministic interpretation? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-005]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK007 Do stale fallback requirements align between user scenarios and functional requirements without conflicting outcomes? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2 Scenario 2, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK008 Are typed error requirements consistent across invalid input, anti-bot events, rate limits, and cache failures? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-009]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK009 Are success criteria objectively measurable with explicit validation method and pass/fail thresholds for each criterion? [Acceptance Criteria, Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-002, Spec §SC-003, Spec §SC-004, Spec §SC-005]
- [ ] CHK010 Is the “no downstream network call” criterion tied to a defined observable signal (e.g., span/metric/log field) in requirements? [Acceptance Criteria, Gap, Spec §SC-002, Spec §FR-010]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK011 Are primary-flow requirements complete for valid VIN report retrieval and summary retrieval independently? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK012 Are alternate-flow requirements complete for cache-hit versus scrape-required execution paths? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1 Scenario 2, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK013 Are exception-flow requirements complete for invalid VIN, CAPTCHA, 403/429, and upstream partial failures? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK014 Are recovery-flow requirements specified for stale-data return and terminal error behavior when recovery is not possible? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-006, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 Are requirements explicit for VIN normalization and handling of forbidden characters (`I/O/Q`) across both tools? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-002, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK016 Are requirements defined for partial/missing report sections and resulting summary-field semantics? [Edge Case, Gap, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK017 Are rate-limit edge conditions (daily cap threshold, reset window, and retry guidance) fully specified? [Edge Case, Gap, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK018 Are performance requirements complete for both warm-cache and scrape paths, including measurement conditions? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §SC-003, Plan §Performance Goals]
- [ ] CHK019 Are observability requirements specific enough to ensure consistent telemetry for success and each typed error class? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-010]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK020 Are external dependency assumptions (credentials availability, Carfax availability, shared envelope conventions) validated or constrained in requirements? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK021 Are dependency-failure requirements defined for SQLite/cache-layer failures and credential misconfiguration scenarios? [Dependency, Gap, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-009, Spec §Assumptions]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK022 Are any terms such as “when available” and “where applicable” resolved into explicit, testable requirement language? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-008]
- [ ] CHK023 Is an explicit requirement ID traceability link defined from each success criterion to one or more functional requirements? [Traceability, Gap, Spec §FR-001-012, Spec §SC-001-005]
